page: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v6 is a compute-focused virtual machine from the Dldsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores with hyper-threading enabled. Operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz, the processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for accelerated matrix operations.

The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This design prioritizes raw compute power over memory capacity, representing a clear tradeoff for memory-intensive workloads. However, it includes 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, providing substantial high-speed local disk capacity for data-intensive operations.

Benchmark results demonstrate top-tier performance in multi-core processing, static web serving, and image processing. The hardware also delivers strong memory bandwidth and efficient LLM inference, particularly in prompt processing for large models. This profile makes the D64lds_v6 highly suitable for compute-heavy workloads, software compilation, web serving, and database operations that do not require massive RAM footprints.
description: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v6 is a compute-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. The server includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It delivers top-tier performance in multi-core benchmarks, static web serving, and image processing, alongside strong memory bandwidth. While the low memory allocation presents a tradeoff for RAM-heavy databases, the inclusion of Intel AMX and AVX-512 instructions makes it highly efficient for compute-intensive tasks, software compilation, and prompt-processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v6 is a compute-optimized server with 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and web serving performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64lds_v6 is a compute-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage.
tagline: A compute-optimized server featuring high-speed Intel processors, substantial local storage, and top-tier multi-core performance for intensive workloads.

128.0 GB system memory with a low memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU
3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier performance in multi-core execution, static web serving, and image processing
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated mathematical and matrix operations
Well-suited for software compilation, web serving, and compute-heavy workloads
